ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for that year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or qualifications about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES environmental_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend observation */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value reflecting the trend for the year */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_trends_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES environmental_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data that was submitted */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "submitted_by" TEXT /* User who submitted the data */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of data submission */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version update */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the version change */,
  "changed_fields" TEXT /* Fields that were changed in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* The notification message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of report creation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
